author: Robby Sneiderman
name: Full GPTQ + XSA-4 + SWA/EMA + Score-First TTT
blurb: Hessian-aware GPTQ with percentile clip search, XSA on last 4 layers, EMA(0.997) + Tight SWA, legal score-first TTT (3 epochs, AdamW lr=1e-4, freeze first 9/11 blocks). LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, GQA 8H/4KV, BigramHash(3072), VE128, Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, U-Net skips. LZMA compression.
